# RHEL 10 Kickstart - generated by rack-director
# OS: RHEL 10
# Device: 550e8400-e29b-41d4-a716-44665544c003

install
text
reboot

clearpart --none

# Network
network --bootproto=static --ip=127.0.0.100 --netmask=255.0.0.0 --gateway=127.0.0.1 --nameserver=8.8.8.8 --hostname=node-44665544c003 --device=52:54:00:c0:01:03

# Pre-existing partitions (created by partition_disks action).
# --noformat preserves existing data; --onpart references the pre-created partition.
# Partitions with no mount_point (biosboot, LVM PVs) are omitted.

part /boot/efi --fstype="vfat" --onpart=sda1 --noformat

part /boot --fstype="ext4" --onpart=sda2 --noformat

part / --fstype="xfs" --onpart=sda3 --noformat


# LVM: declare pre-existing VGs and LVs.
# Each unique VG is declared once; logvol entries reference pre-existing LVs.


bootloader --location=mbr

%packages
@base
rhel10-uefi-simple
%end

%post
echo "rack-director-provisioned" > /etc/rack-director
%end
